panels.description: Medium shot: Young Elizabeth and narrator standing side by side in a lush Alpine garden, soft golden hour sunlight, harmonious and gentle atmosphere, victorian-era clothing.

bubbles.text: She was my more than sister; we were brought up together in perfect harmony.

panels.description: Wide split-screen style: Left side shows Elizabeth looking at mountains with a book, right side shows the narrator looking at a microscope/scientific charts. Contrasting personalities.

bubbles.text: Elizabeth sought the poets and the mountains, while I thirsted to investigate the causes of things.

panels.description: Wide shot: The secluded Belrive estate by the lake in Geneva, peaceful and isolated, mountain backdrop, warm morning light.

bubbles.text: My parents eventually retired to a secluded life in our campagne near the shores of Lake Geneva.

panels.description: Medium shot: Henry Clerval holding a wooden sword, posing dramatically like a knight, smiling with youthful energy, home library background.

bubbles.text: En garde! We shall play the heroes of the Round Table!

panels.description: Close-up: Narrator looking intensely into a flickering candle flame, eyes wide with scholarly fervor, shadows cast on face reflecting deep intellectual passion.

bubbles.text: My passions were turned not to play, but to the mysterious secrets of heaven and earth.
